description: Creates a numbered step annotation at a specified position with a given logical length. Used to mark steps in step-by-step solutions with an optional label and styling.
utility: Annotate logical steps in solutions with numbered markers

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position of the step, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: length
arguments.description: Logical length of the step, specified as size(N) where N > 0

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Optional step label as a quoted string, defaults to '?'

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

examples.scenario: Step 1 marker for center verification (diameter through center lesson)
Step 2 marker for line substitution check (diameter through center lesson)
Step 1 marker for function definition in solve lesson
Step marker in quadratic equation lesson with size and stroke
Two step markers for trig substitution derivation combined with stepcombine
examples.expression:
astep_1 = annotationstep(at(4,12), size(11.8), "1")
astep_2 = annotationstep(at(9,22), size(4.7), "1")
scomb_1 = stepcombine(at(3,37), astep_1, "+",astep_2,"text(result)")
